name: The marketing role of IPOs: evidence from internet stocks
snippet: This paper explores the potential marketing benefits of going public and of IPO underpricing. We examine the impact of IPO underpricing on website traffic.

snippet: Following the dotcom bubble, internet IPOs dwindled in comparison to the number issued during the bubble, while the number of non-internet IPOs increased.
